title: Deader Undead
description: Slightly tweaks the color and features of some undead mobs
body:
![A shot of a zombie and a skeleton together](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b76f00f437f641b8200432a05ccaf1b563078d3.png)

#  Deader Undead

this pack mostly recolors and slightly tweaks some of the undead mobs in the game, mostly to remove the amount of green in zombies. 

### Currently changes

- Skeletons
- Strays
- Zombies
- Husks
- Villager Zombies
- Skeleton Horses
- Zombified Piglins
- Zoglins
- Phantoms

### Planned features
- Zombie Horse
- Spawn egg textures
